## BEM-926 completed | 2026-05-31
Prepared corrected full-system protocol v4 after operator rejected BEM-925 for treating objects as if they had prompts and for insufficient detail.

Result: DRAFT_FOR_OPERATOR_REVIEW_AFTER_DEEP_REWORK. Key correction: objects General Director, Director and Worker are not LLM agents and do not have prompts; they have object passports, rules, functions, channels, curators, internal contours, reports and Definition of Done. Prompts exist only for LLM-executed roles/providers and operational handlers. Document is Russian-first, detailed by roadmap substeps 1.1..8.2, and explicitly creates GD/DIR/WRK objects with passports, registry refs, curators, contours and tests. It preserves accepted decisions: workspace belongs to internal contour; no local individual element rules; vertical links curator-to-curator; internal contour algorithm Curator -> Analyst -> Auditor -> Executor -> Auditor with revision via Analyst; horizontal links Auditor A -> Analyst B; provider model GPT Analyst + Claude Auditor + Claude Executor with GPT-Codex/Codex fallback. Claude's 13 requirements are mapped to roadmap steps and release blockers.
Local operator artifacts: BEM926_final_working_system_protocol_v4_ru.docx and BEM926_final_working_system_protocol_v4_ru.zip.
